Where your team and AI come together

Rovo AI helps teams drive better outcomes faster

Jumpstart planning

Create work items from your favorite tools, then use Rovo AI to break down big ideas, polish descriptions, and link relevant resources in a snap.

View all features

Focus on impact

Cut down on repetitive work with AI agents that make it easier to create project plans, identify trends, and flag potential risks.

Meet Rovo agents

Stay in sync

Surface related work, summarize lengthy comments, and connect work to company goals to give your team the details they need to work faster and make better decisions.

Explore Rovo AI in Jira

Meet AI-powered project management

Let Rovo handle the work around your work so your team can focus on what matters.

  1. Align work with goals

    Align strategic projects to goals so everyone can connect their work to company impact

    Explore goals

  2. Plan your project

    Go from the big picture to concrete tasks with Rovo AI to speed up your planning processes

    Explore AI Features

  3. Automate tedious tasks

    Stay focused on impact with powerful automations to update work status, pull data from your integrations, and assign agents tasks

    Explore Studio

  4. Put agents to work

    Call on Rovo agents to handle tasks, check on progress, and flag risks – while you stay in control.

    Explore Agents in Jira

  5. Stay in sync

    Get caught up on context faster, and make smarter decisions using data that Rovo pulls from every company resource

    Explore the Teamwork Graph

  6. Learn as you deliver

    Gain valuable insights on emerging trends from your projects, as you go, so each iteration gets better and better

    Explore all Jira features

Bring tools to life with Rovo agents

If your team uses it, Jira integrates with it. Orchestrate your entire stack from one workspace with context and control.

Learn more about MCP Gallery

All your tools, one collection

Get Jira, Confluence, Loom, and Rovo in one collection to bring together projects, knowledge, video communication, and AI-powered insights.
